sentiment: The things that move us most are the ones we cannot see — wind, trust, and the quiet hiding of what matters.

stories.title: A backdoor in a LinkedIn job offer
stories.summary: A security researcher discovers a malicious backdoor hidden in what appeared to be a legitimate LinkedIn job offer, revealing how trust in professional contexts can be weaponized.

stories.title: Banned Book Library in a Wi-Fi Smart Light Bulb
stories.summary: A clever project hides an entire library of banned books inside an ordinary smart light bulb, concealing knowledge in the most mundane objects.

stories.title: TinyWind: A pixel pirate sailing game with real wind physics
stories.summary: A pixel-art pirate sailing game simulates real wind physics, letting players feel the invisible forces that move vessels across open water.
